demonstrated_techniques: Computer vision-based instrument tracking using structured light patterns
Tool-to-surface distance measurement with millimeter precision
Real-time feedback for surgical performance assessment

Value proposition of expert surgical performance
common_errors_addressed: Lack of objective measurement tools in surgical training
Inability to relate instrument tracking to surgical surface topology

confidence_rationale: This is clearly an academic presentation about surgical technology, not an FLS task performance. The slides discuss instrument tracking technology and surgical training methodologies.
